title: Carboxymethyl-Sagocellulose-Stabilized Fe3O4 Nanoparticles
author: Anand Kumar Veeramachineni
materials: Stir for 12 hours in the dark.
Assess cell viability using MTT assay.

steps.title: Dissolve 1
steps.instruction: Dissolve 1.08 g of ferric chloride hexahydrate and 3.0 g of sodium acetate in 40 mL of ethylene glycol.

steps.title: Homogenize the solution and transfer it to an autoclave
steps.instruction: Homogenize the solution and transfer it to an autoclave.

steps.title: Allow the solution to cool, then...
steps.instruction: Allow the solution to cool, then wash the precipitate with deionized water and dry at 30 °C overnight.

steps.title: Disperse 0
steps.instruction: Disperse 0.60 g of Fe3O4 nanoparticles in 350 mL of ethanol and 3 mL of deionized water.

steps.title: Add 4 mL of APS and...
steps.instruction: Add 4 mL of APS and stir for 12 hours under nitrogen atmosphere at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash the precipitate with deionized water...
steps.instruction: Wash the precipitate with deionized water and dry at 30 °C overnight.

steps.title: Dissolve 1 g of CMSC in...
steps.instruction: Dissolve 1 g of CMSC in 200 mL of PBS (pH 7.0).

steps.title: Add EDC and sulfo-NHS at a molar ratio of 0
steps.instruction: Add EDC and sulfo-NHS at a molar ratio of 0.5 relative to the carboxyl groups of CMSC.

steps.title: Dialyze against distilled water for 6...
steps.instruction: Dialyze against distilled water for 6 hours to remove unreacted EDC and sulfo-NHS.

steps.title: Mix the activated CMSC with 5-FU...
steps.instruction: Mix the activated CMSC with 5-FU and Fe3O4-NH2 nanoparticles, stir for 12 hours.

steps.title: Recover the nanoparticles using a magnet,...
steps.instruction: Recover the nanoparticles using a magnet, wash with deionized water, and dry.

steps.title: Incubate HeLa cells with Fe3O4-CMSC-5FU nanoparticles...
steps.instruction: Incubate HeLa cells with Fe3O4-CMSC-5FU nanoparticles at concentrations of 75, 150, and 300 μg/mL for 12 hours.

steps.title: Irradiate with an 808 nm laser...
steps.instruction: Irradiate with an 808 nm laser at a power density of 2 W/cm² for 1-3 minutes.
